untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of: (1) multi-bar uptrend formation ('uphill run'), (2) descending triangle formation (requires 3+ bars with lower highs and stable/higher lows), (3) 'measure rule' calculation (pattern-specific projection). Current indicator set lacks multi-bar pattern recognition and geometric formation detection. Entry conditions approximate the 'bump at resistance' phase but cannot reliably identify the preceding uptrend or subsequent descending triangle structure.
